title: ageratina saxorum
intro: Ageratina saxorum, also known as Mexican tea, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include relieving menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as reducing fever and soothing skin irritations. Ageratina saxorum can be prepared as herbal tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
